phases.title: Engines Spooling
phases.body: Pulled into Web3 through an Optimism airdrop by two friends. They left for web2; the apron stayed mine. Started grinding wallets, reading docs nobody read.

phases.title: Community Lead, Node Operator
phases.body: Vitall mod to Lead. Taught myself to run nodes from scratch. Learned that infrastructure is just discipline repeated daily.

phases.title: Validator on the Line
phases.body: Stood up an Aptos validator. Real stake, real slashing risk, real uptime pressure. The kind of responsibility that teaches you fast.

phases.title: Drained
phases.body: Lost ~$4K to an approval-phishing signature. Not just money. A lesson in trust, signatures, and why I read every approval now.

phases.title: Helicopter MRO, Cibubur
phases.body: Three months on the hangar floor at a heli maintenance shop. Hands on Bell, Sikorsky, Airbus. NDT, autorotation theory, ATC comms. The work that made me feel human.

phases.title: Security & AI Agents
phases.body: Bug bounty across HackerOne, Bugcrowd, Cantina. Building AI agents that automate Web3 work. Translating between Indonesia's reality and the global frontier.
